basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra Public Service Commission has published the Chemist Group-B Notification 2026 on Advt No. 016/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Chemist Group-B positions. Candidates within the age range of 19 to 43 years (as on 01-10-2026) and holding a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry, preferably Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent, are eligible to apply online at the official MPSC website. The application process will be active from the start date from 17-06-2026 to 07-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 43 years (as on 01-10-2026) Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.maharashtra_public_service_commission_mp: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent

content_sections.heading: MPSC Chemist Group-B Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MPSC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MPSC Chemist Group-B Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MPSC Chemist Group-B Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Chemist Group-B Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 43 years (as on 01-10-2026) Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Chemist Group-B Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Chemist Group-B Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 19 years and the maximum age limit is 43 years as of 01 October 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Chemist Group-B post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry, preferably in Inorganic Chemistry, or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Chemist Group-B post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Chemist Group-B position in this recruitment drive by MPSC.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR candidates is Rs. 394/-, while for OBC/EWS/Orphan/PWD candidates, it is Rs. 294/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 41,800 to Rs. 1,32,300 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Written Examination followed by Document Verification to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification is released by MPSC, which typically recruits for state government posts. Interested candidates should check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I pay the application fee?
faq.answer: The application fee can be paid online. The last date for online fee payment and challan generation/payment is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the MPSC official website. Direct links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
